entities.name: GFSAD CROP MASK
entities.description: A global 1 km dataset providing spatial distribution of cropland extent for the year 2010

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: A technique used to gather input data for the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: LANDSAT
entities.description: A remote sensing satellite used as input data for the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: AVHRR
entities.description: Advanced Very High Resolution Radiometer used as input data for the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: SPOT
entities.description: Satellite Probatoire d'Observation de la Terre used as input data for the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: MODIS
entities.description: Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectrometer used as input data for the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: SECONDARY ELEVATION DATA
entities.description: Input data used to create the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: 50-year climate precipitation data used as input for the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: 20-year climate temperature data used as input for the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: GROUND DATA
entities.description: Reference sub-meter to 5-meter resolution ground data used as input for the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: COUNTRY STATISTICS DATA
entities.description: Input data used to create the GFSAD Crop Mask

entities.name: CROPLAND EXTENT MAP
entities.description: A disaggregated five class global map derived for nominal 2010 at 1-km resolution
